mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO wishlist (user_id, pen_id) VALUES (#{user_id}, #{pen_id})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM wishlist WHERE user_id = #{user_id} AND pen_id = #{pen_id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM wishlist WHERE user_id = #{user_id} AND pen_id = #{pen_id}

SELECT w.wish_id, w.user_id, w.pen_id, DATE_FORMAT(w.created_at, '%Y.%m.%d') AS created_at, p.pen_name, p.pen_address, att.pen_image, IFNULL(ROUND(AVG(r.rev_star), 1), 0) AS star, COUNT(r.rev_num) AS rv, IFNULL(MIN(rm.rm_price), 0) AS rm_price FROM wishlist w JOIN PENSION p ON p.pen_id = w.pen_id LEFT JOIN REVIEW r ON r.pen_id = p.pen_id LEFT JOIN PENSION_ROOM rm ON rm.pen_id = p.pen_id LEFT JOIN PENSION_ATTACH att ON att.pen_id = p.pen_id WHERE w.user_id = #{user_id} GROUP BY w.wish_id, w.user_id, w.pen_id, w.created_at, p.pen_name, p.pen_address, att.pen_image ORDER BY w.created_at DESC
